        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_fighter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        add_technology = early_fighter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_fighter — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_fighter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

# ── AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) ──

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_airframe }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }

    # heavy_fighter3 — 1944

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_heavy_fighter3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ww1_seaplane1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_ww1_seaplane1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# ww1_seaplane2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    # ww1_seaplane1 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_seaplane1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_seaplane1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_seaplane1 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_seaplane1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_seaplane1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_seaplane2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_seaplane2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_seaplane2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_seaplane2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_seaplane2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_seaplane2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_naval_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_naval_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_naval_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (20 techs) ──

# ww1_zeppelin1
#   year=1912 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_ww1_zeppelin1
#   year=1912 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_zeppelin2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_ww1_zeppelin2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

# bba_jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    # ww1_zeppelin1 — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_zeppelin1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_zeppelin1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_zeppelin1 — 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_zeppelin1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_zeppelin1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_zeppelin2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_zeppelin2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_zeppelin2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_zeppelin2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_zeppelin2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_zeppelin2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_large_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = miniature_fighters
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aerial_hangars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (20 techs) ──

# ww1_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber4
#   year=1927 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber4
#   year=1927 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# bba_jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    # ww1_bomber1 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_bomber1 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_bomber2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_bomber2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_bomber3 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_bomber3 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_bomber4 — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_bomber4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1927 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_bomber4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_bomber4 — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_bomber4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1927 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_bomber4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_technology = jet_engines
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_fire_control_system

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_decryption
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_computing_machine
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_encryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_radio
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_computing_machine
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_encryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_decryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    # chemical_research — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = chemical_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = chemical_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_unlocker1 — 1903
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tank_unlocker1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1903 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = tank_unlocker1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_carrier_pigeons — 1903
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tank_carrier_pigeons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1903 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = tank_carrier_pigeons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio — 1907
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1907 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # torpedotech1 — 1907
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = torpedotech1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1907 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = torpedotech1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1907
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1907 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # hoi4tgw_decryption — 1907
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hoi4tgw_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1907 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = hoi4tgw_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # hoi4tgw_encryption — 1907
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hoi4tgw_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1907 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = hoi4tgw_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # supertech1 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = supertech1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = supertech1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # subhulltech1 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = subhulltech1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = subhulltech1

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    # ww1_medicine1 — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_medicine1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_medicine1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_fortification1 — 1900

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = construction5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # excavation5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = excavation5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = excavation5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) ──

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (6 techs) ──

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_cavity_magnatron
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_cavity_magnatron — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = improved_cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (15 techs) ──

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # experimental_rockets — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 — 1944

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

    # rocket_engines — 1944

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines — 1944
