        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (9 techs) ──

# antiair_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    # antiair_1915 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_1918 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1918
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_1922 — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1922
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_TANK (11 techs) ──

# antitank_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    # antitank_1915 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_1918 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1918
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_1922 — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1922
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha3
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery

#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # light_field_gun1 — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = light_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun1 — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha1 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_bertha1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha4 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_bertha4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery1 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery4 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_field_gun2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = light_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha2 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_bertha2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery2 — 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_artillery_global }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery_global
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun3 — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_field_gun3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # bonus_artillery3 — 1922

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = bonus_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_heavy_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # bonus_bertha3 — 1930

            NOT = { has_technology = bonus_bertha3 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech — 1940

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_dp_light_battery — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (33 techs) ──

# ww1_heavy_tank
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_unlocker2]

# ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[gwtank__nostepback, tank_unlocker2__nostepback]

# ww1_heavy_tank2
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar__nostepback
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # ww1_heavy_tank — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_technology = tank_unlocker2
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_technology = gwtank__nostepback
            has_technology = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank2 — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_tank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_super_heavy_tank — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_tank_interwar__nostepback }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1945 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # infantry_weapons — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_binoculars — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_binoculars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_binoculars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_ambulance1 — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_ambulance1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_ambulance1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons1 — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_grenade — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_grenade }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_grenade
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_infantry_equip1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_infantry_equip1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_infantry_equip1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_gasmask — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_gasmask }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_gasmask
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_ambulance2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_ambulance2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_ambulance2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons2 — 1916

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_machinegun1 — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_machinegun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_machinegun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_mortar1 — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_mortar1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_mortar1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_infantry2_equip — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_infantry2_equip }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_infantry2_equip
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_flamethrower1 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_flamethrower1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_flamethrower1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers2 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons3 — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_infantry_equip2 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_infantry_equip2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_infantry_equip2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_machinegun2 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_machinegun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_machinegun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons1919 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons1919
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921 — 1921
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1921 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons_interwar1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1921 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons_interwar1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_mortar2 — 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_mortar2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1924 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_mortar2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons_interwar2 — 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons_interwar2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1924 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons_interwar2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_transport_plane — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1927 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_ww1_transport_plane — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_ww1_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1927 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_ww1_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons3 — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1infantry_weapons3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1927 }

#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # gwtank — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank__nostepback — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_2 — 1913
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_armored_car_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1913 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback — 1913
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1913 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_3 — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_armored_car_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback — 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_b — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_light_tank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = tank_unlocker2
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank__nostepback — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_light_tank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = gwtank__nostepback
            has_technology = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_armored_car_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 — 1922

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) ──

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (18 techs) ──

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_td
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_art
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_spaa
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_td
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_art
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_spaa
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_td
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_art
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_spaa
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_td
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_art
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_spaa
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_td — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_art — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_spaa — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_td — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_art — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_spaa — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank — 1943

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # advanced_medium_td — 1943

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis — 1943

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_td — 1945

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_art — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_spaa — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) ──

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    # main_battle_tank — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MOTORISED (7 techs) ──

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1900 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_motorised
#   year=1914 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension1
#   year=1919 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension2
#   year=1921 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension3
#   year=1927 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    # motorised_infantry — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_motorised — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_motorised }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = early_motorised
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension1 — 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension2 — 1921
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1921 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension3 — 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1927 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_trucks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry2 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
