# night_vision
#   year=1943 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_engineers8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_recon8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_military_police8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_field_hospital8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # tech_support — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_train — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = ww1_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_field_hospital }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_logistics_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_signal_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = radio
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon2 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }

        add_technology = tech_engineers8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon8 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police8 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_military_police8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }

    # tech_field_hospital8 — 1945

            NOT = { has_technology = tech_field_hospital8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            NOT = { has_technology = tech_signal_company8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = night_vision2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # tech_maintenance_company — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (55 techs) ──

# ww1_battleship0_mtg
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    # ww1_battleship0_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_battleship0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_battleship0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_battleship0 — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_battleship0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = ww1_battleship5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── NAVAL / CARRIERS (18 techs) ──

# seaplane_carrier_mtg
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# seaplane_carrier
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier_mtg
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier_mtg
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    # seaplane_carrier_mtg — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = seaplane_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = seaplane_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # seaplane_carrier — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = seaplane_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = seaplane_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_carrier_mtg — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_carrier — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    # ww1_destroyer0_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_destroyer0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_destroyer0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_destroyer0 — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_destroyer0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_destroyer0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_destroyer1_mtg — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_destroyer1_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_destroyer1_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    # ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # advanced_light_cruiser_mtg — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser_mtg — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# modern_naval_mines
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_moduleMTG_mines — 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_mtg — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = transport_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # submarine_mine_laying — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_transport — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mtg_transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = mtg_transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_naval_mines — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_multi_product_supply_ships
    # degaussing — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = degaussing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = degaussing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_submarine_mine_laying — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_landing_craft — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mtg_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = mtg_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # landing_craft_mtg — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = landing_craft_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = landing_craft_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # landing_craft — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airdrop_mines_bba — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = airdrop_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airsweep_mines_bba — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = airsweep_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_support_ship
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_repair_ship
    # advanced_naval_mines — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airdrop_mines — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = airdrop_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_standard_tenshioned_replenishment_alongside_method
    # airsweep_mines — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = airsweep_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_tank_landing_craft — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mtg_tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    # tank_landing_craft_mtg — 1944

            NOT = { has_technology = tank_landing_craft_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_landing_craft — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_naval_mines — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    # ww1_submarine0_mtg — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_submarine0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_submarine0 — 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_submarine0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_submarine1_mtg — 1906
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_submarine1_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1906 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine1_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_submarine1 — 1906
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_submarine1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1906 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_submarine2_mtg — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ww1_submarine2_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine2_mtg

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_submarine_mtg }

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_submarine — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
